title: Technical University of Munich AI Teaching Guidance Crawl Report
summary: This staged run captures a limited but usable TUM ProLehre official PDF on deciding whether and how AI tools may be used in teaching and assessment. Claims are limited to instructor discretion, learning-outcome-based AI-use decisions, communicating allowed and disallowed AI use, the difficulty of controlling AI use, and student training in competent AI use. The run does not establish a comprehensive university-wide AI policy.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Coverage is limited to one official TUM ProLehre teaching guidance PDF; additional TUM data protection, student-facing, and tool-specific sources should be discovered in a future run.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
